lines.english: Why is the new house special?
lines.chinese: 这新房子有什么特别之处？
lines.raw: Why is the new house special? | 这新房子有什么特别之处？

lines.english: I had a letter from my sister yesterday.
lines.chinese: 昨天我收到了我姐姐的一封信。
lines.raw: I had a letter from my sister yesterday. | 昨天我收到了我姐姐的一封信。
She lives in Nigeria. | 她住在尼日利亚。

lines.english: In her letter, she said that she would come to England next year.
lines.chinese: 在信中她说她明年将来英国。
lines.raw: In her letter, she said that she would come to England next year. | 在信中她说她明年将来英国。

lines.english: If she comes, she will get a surprise.
lines.chinese: 如果她来了，她会大吃一惊的。
lines.raw: If she comes, she will get a surprise. | 如果她来了，她会大吃一惊的。

lines.english: We are now living in a beautiful new house in the country.
lines.chinese: 我们现在正住在这乡下一所漂亮的新房子里。
lines.raw: We are now living in a beautiful new house in the country. | 我们现在正住在这乡下一所漂亮的新房子里。

lines.english: Work on it had begun before my sister left.
lines.chinese: 这所房子的建造在我姐姐离开之前就动工了。
lines.raw: Work on it had begun before my sister left. | 这所房子的建造在我姐姐离开之前就动工了。

lines.english: The house was completed five months ago.
lines.chinese: 房子在5个月前就竣工了。
lines.raw: The house was completed five months ago. | 房子在5个月前就竣工了。

lines.english: In my letter, I told her that she could stay with us.
lines.chinese: 我在信中告诉她，她可以和我们住在一起。
lines.raw: In my letter, I told her that she could stay with us. | 我在信中告诉她，她可以和我们住在一起。

lines.english: The house has many large rooms and there is a lovely garden.
lines.chinese: 这所房子有许多大房间，还有一个漂亮的花园。
lines.raw: The house has many large rooms and there is a lovely garden. | 这所房子有许多大房间，还有一个漂亮的花园。

lines.english: It is a very modern house, so it looks strange to some people.
lines.chinese: 这是一座很现代化的房子，所以有些人觉得它样子很怪。
lines.raw: It is a very modern house, so it looks strange to some people. | 这是一座很现代化的房子，所以有些人觉得它样子很怪。

lines.english: It must be the only modern house in the district.
lines.chinese: 它肯定是这个地区唯一的一座现代化住宅。
lines.raw: It must be the only modern house in the district. | 它肯定是这个地区唯一的一座现代化住宅。
